# SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
#
# Wells Fargo Advisors SNAPSHOT — ASSET ADVISOR managed brokerage holding
# securities. Modelled on a June 2025 production statement for a different
# account than wf_advisors_snapshot_synthetic.txt.
#
# HAND-WRITTEN, NOT EXTRACTED — see the header of that file for why, and for
# the redaction table. Labels and dollar figures verbatim; identity replaced.
# Account number is masked to 0000-0000, same as the other fixture.
#
# WHY A SECOND FIXTURE. The same institution prints a MATERIALLY DIFFERENT
# statement for a managed account holding securities, and every difference is
# a place the parser can be wrong:
#
#   * the cash flow summary gains 'Securities sold and redeemed', 'Securities
#     purchased', 'Advisory, manager and platform fees' — and 'Electronic
#     funds transfers', which appears TWICE, once under additions and once
#     under subtractions, with the sign carried by position rather than label
#   * the income summary gains 'Interest', 'Ordinary dividends and ST capital
#     gains', 'Qualified dividends', and a bare 'Other'
#   * the gain/loss rows read 'Short term (S)' here and 'Short term/Net lots'
#     on the cash-only account — the (S)/(L) are tax-lot designators
#   * new blocks appear: a bond maturity schedule, 'Gross proceeds' and
#     'Foreign withholding' on one line, and the advisory program + effective
#     fee rate that mark this account as managed rather than self-directed

SNAPSHOT
Current period ending June 30, 2025
ACCOUNT NAME: ORCHARD EXAMPLE LLC
ACCOUNT NUMBER: 0000-0000
REDACTED MAILING ADDRESS
user@example.com
Your Financial Advisor:
TEST ADVISOR Phone: 555-000-0000
Wells Fargo Advisors is a trade name used by Wells Fargo Clearing Services, LLC

# lookup above must stay scoped to its own section.
